x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Third-party assessment volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist assessment summarization and AI-assisted scoring. Higher assessment volumes mean greater time savings for risk analysts who benefit most from AI-generated summaries and recommended risk ratings.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Initiate third-party risk assessments to build the data foundation for AI issue recommendations.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb2
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Third-party assessment volume determines the scale of benefit from Now Assist assessment summarization and AI-assisted scoring. Higher assessment volumes mean greater time savings for risk analysts who benefit most from AI-generated summaries and recommended risk ratings.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Third-party Assessment Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_vdr_risk_asmt_assessment");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=100)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" assessments",finding:c+" assessments found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" assessments",finding:c+" assessments found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 assessments",finding:"No assessments found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>TPRM</module>
<number>CHK0006207</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Initiate third-party risk assessments to build the data foundation for AI issue recommendations.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>5e03e33acfd903108935fb251d851cb2</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
